name: Hey Lola
description: Trial rescue partner for Hey Lola — used to preview the foundation listing, shelter profile and claim flow.

name: Animal Haven
description: Animal Haven is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit shelter in SoHo, NYC, finding homes for cats and dogs since 1967. Their adoption process is in-person at the shelter, with a focus on careful matchmaking and lifelong support after adoption.

name: Bobbi and the Strays
description: A no-kill organization rescuing and rehabilitating orphaned, stray, abused and special-needs cats and dogs across New York City and Long Island.

name: Badass Animal Rescue
description: A foster-based 501(c)3 saving and rehabilitating loving dogs from high-kill shelters since 2011 — over 4,000 dogs rescued.

name: AMA Animal Rescue
description: Angels for Mistreated Animals — a no-kill rescue in Brooklyn rehabilitating abused and injured dogs and cats and giving them loving futures.

name: Social Tees Animal Rescue
description: A foster-based, strictly no-kill rescue in the East Village that takes abandoned animals from kill shelters into safe homes, matching each one with the right family.

name: Korean K9 Rescue
description: Rescues dogs from the meat trade and high-kill shelters in South Korea and finds them loving homes across the New York area.

name: NYC Second Chance Rescue
description: A New York City rescue saving abused, neglected and medically fragile animals and giving them a second chance at a loving home.

name: JCNJ
description: New Jersey rescue partner — full profile details to be confirmed.
